content:
🔥 cursor-kit-for-ai | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Accelerating the development of AI-powered applications and services by providing pre-configured, production-ready project structures and AI agent skills.
✨ Key Features: • Production-ready project templates • CLI for project creation and plugin management • Extensible plugin system for Cursor AI skills • Support for various stacks including FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, and Kubernetes
📖 Summary: Cursor Kit for AI is a scaffolding library that provides production-ready project templates and plugins for developers using Cursor AI. It enables the rapid creation of full-stack applications, bots, and DevOps solutions with a single CLI command, significantly accelerating development.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
